title: Neopanax simplex
intro: Neopanax simplex, also known as Kowhai or New Zealand Kowhai, is a native New Zealand plant species belonging to the family Santalaceae. The health benefits of Neopanax simplex include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Neopanax simplex is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Neopanax simplex is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The plant is also known as the 'Makura'.
